entities.normalized_value: Acts, Rules, Regulations, National and International Standards

entities.value: 1.8% to 9.5% volume of gas in air
14 to 15 kg./sq.cm. for each degree centigrade
minimum distance between vessel and kerb wall shall be the diameter of the vessel or five meters, whichever is less
entities.normalized_value: minimum distance between vessel and kerb wall = min(vessel diameter, 5m)

entities.value: concrete floor shall be graded to form a slope of minimum 1:100
kerb wall height shall be a minimum of 30 cm but shall not exceed 60 cm

spillage diversion area shall be located at a distance where the flames from the fire will not impinge on the vessel. This distance shall be equal to the diameter of the nearest vessel or 15 m, whichever is more
entities.normalized_value: spillage diversion area distance = max(nearest vessel diameter, 15m)
